query:
ALTER TABLE web_app_scans 
ADD COLUMN zap_ajax_spider_scan_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN detected_tech_stack text,
ADD COLUMN llm_scan_config text,
ADD COLUMN scan_policy_name varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN auth_configured boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN ajax_spider_used boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN attack_chain_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN caldera_operation_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN metasploit_session_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN domain_intel_scan_id int;
